conversations.content: Delete the existing ssh key from my github account.

<function_thought>
To delete the existing SSH key from Emma Johnson's GitHub account, I need to first retrieve the linked SSH keys. After identifying the existing SSH key, I can proceed to delete it. The function `git_get_linked_ssh_keys` will be called first to obtain the list of existing SSH keys.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[git_get_linked_ssh_keys()]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>
You should verify your account first. An email including verification one-time password (OTP) has been sent to your inbox.

<function_thought>
